generic_demo.hintText:
Terms
• Adjacent: top-down-view, orthogonal.
• Level-# Die: Level-1 on bottom, Level-2 stacked on Level-1, etc.
• Supporting Dice: Adjacent dice on the same level. Color & value do not affect this.
• Stable Die: Die whose level is less than or equal to the number of its supporting dice.
• Unstable Die: Die whose level is greater than the number of its supporting dice.
• Colony: Any number of adjacent same-color dice, counting all branches.
• Target Die: Any die that is on the top of a stack, adjacent to (or matches) color of placing die, and has the same value of the placing die.
On Your Turn
1. Roll two dice you have access to (automatic).
2. Perform one action with each rolled die:
• Create New Colony
 Place die on level one, adjacent to any die that does not match its color. • Expand Colony
 Place die on level one. The placed die must be adjacent to a die of the same color and value. • Stack
 Target an stable die. Stack the rolled die on top of the targetted die. • Remove
 Target an unstable die. Remove and place both it and the rolled die back into their respective piles.
Endgame & Scoring
The game ends immediately if the active player does not have two different colored dice to roll at the start of their turn.

Score equal to the lower value between your two colors’ highest colony values. Highest lower score wins! Tied players compare their higher colony values, highest value wins.

phase1.detail:
: If this icon is showing in the top right, that means at least one other player is modifying a value (not necessarily the same as you) at the same time. This does not affect your value changes, but a notice won't be added to the history until all players have closed the modify value window. Click on the icon to forcibly close the modify value window for all players except for yourself.

Update button: Closes this window and updates your values according to the input change. This change will not show up in the history box until all players have closed the modify value window.

Change by: You may type a positive or negative value here, and this difference will automatically apply to the 'Set to' value next to it.

Set Total to: You may type any value here to indicate the total value, and this will automatically calculate the difference and show this as the 'Change by' value next to it.

+/- buttons: Click these buttons to add or subtract 1/5 value from the 'Set Total to' & 'Change by' values.

info.description: Bacteria grow, split, and mutate in a shared fight for dominance.
info.helpText:
Players take seats. Press the Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start.

At the start of your turn the correct two dice will be rolled for you. You cannot end your turn until you have placed both dice.

The board state is movable by clicking the arrow buttons in the bottom-left.

Click the victory points number to input a value.
